step_1_scanned_metadata.narrative_summary: Virginia Horton, under hypnotic regression, recalls two abduction experiences. The first, at age six in 1950, involved being taken aboard a UFO by humanoid entities who took samples from her leg and questioned her about Earth's life forms, followed by a brief trip to view Earth from space. The second, in 1960 in the Alsatian woods of France, involved being lured by a telepathic 'deer' (later revealed to be a disguised entity), taken aboard a UFO for a 'celebration' of the entities' research, and having blood and tissue samples taken from her nose. Both encounters involved memory suppression, which was partially overcome through hypnosis, and left her with physical evidence like scars or blood. The investigator, Budd Hopkins, notes parallels with other abduction cases and speculates on the purpose of these long-term studies and potential implants.

encounter_events.source_citation: though Virginia's parents remember their daughter's deep childhood wound, they have no idea at all of its origin.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia has a linear or circular scar from childhood that persists into adulthood, consistent with A107 (linear or circular scar). This is a consciously known physical fact, not recovered under hypnosis.

encounter_events.source_citation: incisions made by remote-control, robotlike machinery inside a UFO
encounter_events.ai_justification: Under hypnosis, Virginia's wound is attributed to an incision made by machinery inside a UFO, matching X222 (beings make incision for unknown purpose).

encounter_events.source_citation: remote-control, robotlike machinery inside a UFO
encounter_events.ai_justification: The machinery performing the incision is described as 'remote-control, robotlike,' consistent with B205 (robot).

encounter_events.source_citation: The parents remember very little for two and possibly three
encounter_events.ai_justification: The parents' inability to recall the circumstances of the wound implies a time lapse or memory gap surrounding the event, consistent with E200 (time lapse). The investigator frames this amnesia as evidence of an abduction event.

encounter_events.source_citation: The only mark on my body
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia describes a distinct scar as the only mark on her body, consistent with A107 (linear or circular scar) as a lasting physical aftereffect of the encounter.

encounter_events.source_citation: Central was the issue of how she got inside the UFO in the first place.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia has no clear memory of how she entered the craft during the 1957 abduction, which is doorway amnesia — a blackout on entering the craft.

encounter_events.source_citation: It was just as though somebody was carrying me over to the couch and setting me down. I don't think I was picked up by a machine . . . or by a vacuum . . . nothing like that.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia has a vague sense of being physically picked up and carried to the couch inside the craft, consistent with E121 (pseudo-floating effect: witness feels light or is carried). She explicitly rules out mechanical or vacuum-like levitation, describing a sensation of being carried by someone.

encounter_events.source_citation: it could just as easily have been that I was hypnotized and thought I saw a deer to make it easy to have a story to tell / Maybe it was something else I was suggested to remember as a deer
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness suspects the deer was a screen memory or perceptual illusion implanted to cover the real experience, constituting a perceptual distortion or illusion (E106).

encounter_events.source_citation: humanoid type person picking me up and carrying me
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness describes a humanoid type person, establishing the entity as humanoid.

encounter_events.source_citation: humanoid type person picking me up and carrying me
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness is picked up and carried by the being, indicating a lifting/transport effect consistent with floating or being carried.

encounter_events.source_citation: I think that's one of the things I told my friend on the ship.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia refers to the being as 'my friend,' indicating a friendly, familiar manner from the being.

encounter_events.source_citation: I told him about the different kinds of animals. I guess that's how we got to talking about chickens.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness describes a conversational exchange with the being about animals, indicating verbal communication in the subject's language.

encounter_events.source_citation: I told him about the different kinds of animals. I guess that's how we got to talking about chickens. I think from that, that's when he suggested that I go gather the eggs and bring them in.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being shows interest in earthly conditions by discussing different kinds of animals and requesting the witness gather eggs, demonstrating curiosity about earthly life and conditions.

encounter_events.source_citation: that's when he suggested that I go gather the eggs and bring them in.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being instructs the witness to perform a specific utilitarian task — gathering eggs and bringing them in.

encounter_events.source_citation: I think I told him a lot about animals and plants, 'cause he was interested in that, what they look like and what they feel like, how they live and eat. How big they are.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being shows intense interest in earthly conditions — specifically animals and plants, their appearance, texture, behavior, and size — matching B740 (interest in earthly conditions and problems).

encounter_events.source_citation: I think I described them verbally, but he could understand them.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being communicated with Virginia verbally and understood her descriptions in her language, indicating verbal communication in the subject's language.

encounter_events.source_citation: He might have had pictures that he showed me and I would say, 'Yes, they look like that. No, they don't look like that.'
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being showed Virginia images/pictures for her to confirm or deny, functioning as visual reference material. This maps to S101 (witness sees a map or image) as the being displayed visual representations for the witness to evaluate.

encounter_events.source_citation: Curious. And a good listener. Had a sense of humor.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia explicitly describes the being as having a sense of humor, directly matching B915.

encounter_events.source_citation: And very patient.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being is described as patient and a good listener, indicating friendly and considerate manner matching B900.

encounter_events.source_citation: And very old and mature. I mentioned last time that when I asked how old he was he just said, 'Very old,'
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being identifies itself as 'very old' and is described as mature, matching B801 (one being is an elder).

encounter_events.source_citation: I had the sense that he didn't think I could understand how old he was.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being's age is beyond human comprehension, implying a fundamentally different understanding of age/time, matching B750 (no understanding of age) or B751 (beings speak oddly of time). B750 fits as the being implies its age is incomprehensible to humans.

encounter_events.source_citation: He was probably somewhere between five feet and five-feet-five-inches.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being's height of 5'0" to 5'5" falls in the moderately short range (4-5 feet), matching B221.

encounter_events.source_citation: And I think he was taller than the others, but only by an inch or two. Maybe a little bit more.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The leader/elder being is taller than the others, indicating dimorphism associated with rank, matching B805.

encounter_events.source_citation: the person who carried me was shorter than an adult. Sort of the size of a big kid.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being that carried Virginia was the size of a large child, indicating short stature (3.5 feet or less to moderately short). B220 (short, 3.5 feet or less) fits as 'the size of a big kid' from a child's perspective suggests quite short.

encounter_events.source_citation: the person who carried me was shorter than an adult. Sort of the size of a big kid.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The shorter being performed the menial task of carrying the witness, while the taller being acted as the communicator/leader, matching B806 (taller beings lead, shorter are subservient, do menial work).

encounter_events.source_citation: they wore something to cover their skin, which I thought was them, but was really what they were wearing, like a soft, supple gray, almost suedelike space suits, to cover them. / Skin-fitting, and it was fairly thick but very soft
encounter_events.ai_justification: The clothing is described as skin-fitting, close-fitting as their skin — matching B301 (tight-fitting).

encounter_events.source_citation: like a soft, supple gray, almost suedelike space suits / Gray and ah . . .
encounter_events.ai_justification: The clothing color is described as gray, matching B361 (off-white, gray).

encounter_events.source_citation: the texture of really fine leather, you know, like nice French leather shoes, really soft leather. Not suede, but soft kid.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The clothing texture is described as leather-like, matching B307 (leather-like).

encounter_events.source_citation: almost suedelike space suits, to cover them. Not like the ones we wear—ones that were as smooth and close-fitting as their skin.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia explicitly calls the garments 'space suits' worn to protect themselves outside, matching B302 (diving suit, astronaut or space suit).

encounter_events.source_citation: the head was simplified, as though the thing
encounter_events.ai_justification: The head is described as 'simplified,' suggesting reduced or minimal features. This maps to B232 (head small) as 'simplified' implies a reduction in complexity/size of features.

encounter_events.source_citation: he just told me to go do that. Just to go about my business. He probably knew that I had a cut and that would be a good way to cover it.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being deflects Virginia's attention by telling her to go about her business, likely to cover up evidence of a cut — implying evasion or deception, matching B906 (beings avoid answering questions or deceive).

encounter_events.source_citation: He was probably somewhere between five feet and five-feet-five-inches. / the head was simplified, as though the thing
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being is described with humanoid proportions (height, head, body) but with non-human features (simplified head, gray suit-covered form), matching B201 (humanoid).

encounter_events.source_citation: he wore over his face didn't have very many openings
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being wears a face mask or covering over the face, matching B346 (face mask).

encounter_events.source_citation: I think what I thought was like big eyes were probably just like glass surfaces or bubble surfaces to protect the eyes
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being has transparent protective bubble coverings over the eyes, matching B344 (transparent face cover).

encounter_events.source_citation: And they were dark and I thought they had big, dark eyes
encounter_events.ai_justification: The eyes appear entirely dark, matching B243 (eyes entirely dark), though the witness later questions whether this was the actual eyes or reflective surfaces.

encounter_events.source_citation: they had big, dark eyes
encounter_events.ai_justification: The eyes are described as large, matching B241 (large size eyes).

encounter_events.source_citation: It seems to me our light was very bright for them
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings appear sensitive to Earth's light, needing protective eye coverings, matching B509 (photophobia: retreat from or stay clear of light).

encounter_events.source_citation: inside their spaceship was very bright
encounter_events.ai_justification: The interior of the craft is described as very bright, matching U230 (bright and uniform lighting).

encounter_events.source_citation: The one that carried me was the taller one.
encounter_events.ai_justification: One being is distinguished as taller than the others, indicating dimorphism associated with rank, matching B805.

encounter_events.source_citation: I think there were three people in all
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness describes humanoid beings, matching B201 (humanoid).

encounter_events.source_citation: they wanted to take off their costumes, so they went into a different part of the ship
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings retreat to remove their costumes out of the witness's sight, implying they dislike being observed without their coverings, matching B909 (beings dislike for witness to watch them).

encounter_events.source_citation: they could talk to me from behind the wall
encounter_events.ai_justification: A wall or barrier separates the witness from the beings, matching U309 (a window, transparent wall or barrier separates witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: there was so much gray and their costumes were gray
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings' clothing is gray, matching B361 (off-white, gray clothing color).

encounter_events.source_citation: either they are gray or it has something to do with their spectrum
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings' skin may be gray, matching B290 (skin white, gray, ashen or claylike).

encounter_events.source_citation: as smooth and close-fitting as their skin . . . it was fairly thick but very soft, and the texture of really fine leather
encounter_events.ai_justification: The outer covering is described as smooth and close-fitting like skin, matching B301 (tight-fitting clothing).

encounter_events.source_citation: the texture of really fine leather
encounter_events.ai_justification: The fabric has a leather-like texture, matching B307 (leather-like clothing).

encounter_events.source_citation: The details of their small size
encounter_events.ai_justification: The investigator summarizes Virginia's description of the beings as small in size, matching B220 (short, 3.5 feet or less).

encounter_events.source_citation: The person that talked to me later from remote was the one I assumed carried me
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being communicated with the witness remotely from behind a wall, implying telepathic or non-verbal remote communication, matching C110 (subject hears voice in head or understands meanings).

encounter_events.source_citation: their dark eyes were 'probably just like glass surfaces, or bubble surfaces to protect the eyes . . . I thought they had big, dark eyes but I don't think that's true.'
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia describes the beings' eyes as appearing to be glass or bubble surfaces protecting the real eyes underneath, matching B249 (eyes transparent or translucent, as if real eyes under).

encounter_events.source_citation: I thought they had big, dark eyes
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia's initial impression was of large, entirely dark eyes, matching B243 (eyes entirely dark), even though she later reinterprets this as a covering.

encounter_events.source_citation: this person was someone senior enough in his own society to have quasi-official status. . . . It would almost be like a retired emeritus professor who was doing research that he liked for his own interest
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia perceives the being as a senior figure with quasi-official status in his society, acting as a leader or principal figure in the encounter, matching B800 (one being acts as leader, spokesman).

encounter_events.source_citation: The things that he explained were like, 'This is a very interesting thing that I do,' the way you'd explain your motivation to do basic research to a child.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being explains his motivation as conducting research, likened to basic research, matching M125 (they have come to learn, teach or experiment).

encounter_events.source_citation: they were listening with bated breath to every word that I said and every thought that I thought. You know, the communication process was completely absorbing them, so I didn't need to get their attention. I had it constantly.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia describes the beings as perceiving her thoughts directly, indicating telepathic communication, matching C110 (subject hears voice in his head or understands meanings).

encounter_events.source_citation: they were listening with bated breath to every word that I said and every thought that I thought
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings are reading Virginia's thoughts without her needing to vocalize, matching X255 (beings probe a witness's mind or read his thoughts).

encounter_events.source_citation: he asked how long we lived and how long these different animals lived.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being asks about human and animal lifespans, showing concern with age, matching B707 (concern with age).

encounter_events.source_citation: how many offspring the chickens have, and I explained about eggs versus having your own babies, and how many people have, and how many different kinds of ani-
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being questions Virginia about reproduction and offspring across species, matching B700 (beings question witness about sex and reproduction).

encounter_events.source_citation: he asked how long we lived and how long these different animals lived. And I told him that they had . . . how many offspring the chickens have
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being's questions about lifespans and animal reproduction reflect a broader interest in earthly conditions and biology, matching B740 (interest in earthly conditions and problems).

encounter_events.source_citation: I think I also explained to him about warm-blooded and cold-blooded animals, which I knew about . . . and I think I explained about nursing and how long animals live and plants, too.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being questions the witness about biological functions of animals and plants on Earth, showing interest in bodily functions and biology of earthly life forms.

encounter_events.source_citation: he asked about weather, too / I explained how it got cold and froze things / about the seasons and how hot it got in the summer and how cold it got in the winter.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being asks about earthly conditions including weather and seasons, showing interest in environmental conditions on Earth.

encounter_events.source_citation: He told me a lot. He explained a lot. / he'd explain to me patiently that they're not a certain way everywhere and that was why he was asking, because they're different in different places.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being communicates verbally with the witness in her language, engaging in extended conversational exchange about biology and geography.

encounter_events.source_citation: he'd explain to me patiently that they're not a certain way everywhere and that was why he was asking
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being is described as patient and polite in manner, taking time to explain things to the child witness.

encounter_events.source_citation: I think he showed me something like slides as though, you know, like windows, so that there were different pictures that would . . . mostly they were pictures of star maps
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being shows the witness a display device resembling windows or slides that projects different images, consistent with a screen displaying visual content.

encounter_events.source_citation: mostly they were pictures of star maps, you know, they would say, 'This is the star . . .' / He did tell me about the Milky Way, you know, and tried to make a picture of how they were with relationship to our Milky Way
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness sees star maps depicting the beings' origin and travel routes, with the being attempting to show spatial relationships between their home and Earth's galaxy.

encounter_events.source_citation: I think most of the pictures he was trying to show me were where he came from and where he visited and where we were with relationship to that / he was, like, from a different Milky Way
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being tells the witness where he originates from, but in terms the witness cannot fully comprehend — she gathers he is from a different galaxy but cannot pinpoint the location.

encounter_events.source_citation: I remember later on I started to look up at the stars. It was just at that time that I began to look up the stars and try to get a sense of distances and relationships
encounter_events.ai_justification: After the encounter, the witness develops a new intellectual interest in astronomy and stellar distances, directly attributed to the being's influence.

encounter_events.source_citation: They did look like star maps, yes, they looked like pictures of stars at night. They looked like slides of the heavens that you might show to somebody, but they had colors. I think they were color-coded for different kinds of stars . . . they had green, and mostly white and blue.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being shows Virginia star maps depicting galaxies with color-coded stars, directly matching S101 (witness sees a star map depicting the beings' origins/routes).

encounter_events.source_citation: There are places that have these kinds of animals and there were a whole lot of slides of things that would remind us of dinosaurs and then slides of other kinds of animals. / Most of the pictures he showed me were plants and animals. A lot of different flowers of different kinds
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being displays images on what appear to be slides or screens showing exotic creatures and plants from other worlds, matching U351 (ship contains a cube or screen displaying scenes).

encounter_events.source_citation: There are a lot of different winged animals and different places. / They're almost like . . . they almost look like fish. Big round kinds of like blowfish or something that go through the air. They must live in a very dense atmosphere. / And, um, I guess snakes, too. / there were soft fuzzies, too. There were soft fuzzies like rodents, bunnies. Large ones.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The images depict otherworldly creatures — winged animals, airborne blowfish-like creatures, large rodent-like animals — from places with different atmospheres, matching W104 (otherworld has unfamiliar plants and animals).

encounter_events.source_citation: I guess he was especially interested in the chickens because they are warm and have feathers, which is unusual. Birds were very interesting to him.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being's special interest in Earth's birds and chickens reflects a scientific curiosity about Earth's biological specimens, matching B650 (gather samples) in the broader sense of studying Earth's biology.

encounter_events.source_citation: He kept talking about diversity, which was something that he was very interested in. Diversity. About how important biological diversity is.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being's repeated emphasis on biological diversity and its importance reflects interest in earthly conditions and problems, matching B740.

encounter_events.source_citation: preserving diversity is the reason that we protect the endangered species, so it was like a reassuring message from him, that he, like, he would be a scientist, and from a scientist's point of view, they cherished the diversity
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being's extensive educational presentation and scientific perspective on diversity implies they have come to learn and teach, matching M125 (they have come to learn, teach or experiment).

encounter_events.source_citation: I think that was a message for me when I grew up, because preserving diversity is the reason that we protect the endangered species
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia interprets the being's emphasis on diversity as a message intended to influence her adult life and values, matching M146 (the life of the witness will change).

encounter_events.source_citation: if somebody else wanted to come here and colonize, they would protect us from having our life-forms threatened because they cherish biological diversity
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being communicates that they would protect Earth from ecological disturbance or colonization by other species, matching M128: beings have come to combat evil enemies or prevent harm.

encounter_events.source_citation: He talked about it with a tone of voice that it was obviously something that he was not only interested in, but something he really cherished
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being communicates verbally in the subject's language, with discernible tone and emotional quality, matching C101.

encounter_events.source_citation: I have the feeling that he's old and that they live a long time / he's very old, and such a tone of voice . . . It's obvious he thought I couldn't understand how old was old.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being is perceived as extremely old and long-lived, matching B761: being is too old.

encounter_events.source_citation: he talked about it as though going from galaxy to galaxy were the kind of thing we'd talk about going from state to state or country to country / either they travel faster than the speed of light, or they live for tens of thousands of years
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being speaks of vast distances and time scales in a casual manner incompatible with human understanding of time, matching B751: beings speak oddly of time.

encounter_events.source_citation: Did he ask you how old you were? Yes. I told him how old I was.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being asks the witness her age, matching B707: concern with age.

encounter_events.source_citation: he picked that up and explained a lot of what he was doing in the same way: he was trying to learn new things about what our world was like.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being explicitly states his purpose is to learn about Earth, matching M125: they have come to learn, teach or experiment.

encounter_events.source_citation: he was trying to learn new things about what our world was like
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being expresses interest in earthly conditions and the nature of the witness's world, matching B740: interest in earthly conditions and problems.

encounter_events.source_citation: He talked about it with a tone of voice that it was obviously something that he was not only interested in, but something he really cherished, You know, a very deep kind of a sense of wonder, and respect about it. Almost a religious quality, too.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being's manner is warm, engaged, and respectful toward the witness, matching B900: beings are friendly, polite, familiar in manner.

encounter_events.source_citation: he was trying to learn new things about what our world was like
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being's stated purpose of learning about Earth's world implies gathering information/samples about the environment, matching B650: gather samples (broadly construed as information gathering about Earth).

encounter_events.source_citation: they had been looking for me. They were calling to me / 'Where were you? We were calling you.' And I said, 'I didn't hear you.' / he said, 'No, you were for awhile and then you weren't,' and he didn't know where I was
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia's brother reports she was missing for a period she cannot account for, and she did not hear calls — classic missing time. She explicitly states she was unaware of the gap.

encounter_events.source_citation: I said, 'I was with my brother,' and he said, 'No, you were for awhile and then you weren't,' and he didn't know where I was, and I said, 'Yes, you were right with me.'
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia and her brother have contradictory memories of the same period — she believes they were together while he insists she vanished. This is obliviousness to others and vice-versa.

encounter_events.source_citation: big, dark . . . big, bright, dark eyes shining
encounter_events.ai_justification: The deer-being is described as having large, bright, dark eyes — matching the large eye size motif for beings.

encounter_events.source_citation: big, bright, dark eyes shining
encounter_events.ai_justification: The eyes are described as entirely dark and shining, consistent with eyes entirely dark.

encounter_events.source_citation: the deer was about the size of a small deer. Medium-sized deer / it was gray, too. The deer was gray. Gray-brown.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being appears in non-humanoid deer form, though Virginia later recognizes a person inside it.

encounter_events.source_citation: The deer was saying good-bye telepathically to me / I was communicating with this deer. That I was in touch with it. And that it was saying good-bye to me.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being communicates telepathically — Virginia hears/understands meanings directly in her mind from the deer entity.

encounter_events.source_citation: the deer is about the size of a small deer... it just looked at me / it was saying good-bye to me
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being communicates a farewell message to the witness.

encounter_events.source_citation: it just sort of dematerialized, disappeared.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The deer-being dematerializes/disappears, matching the disappearance motif.

encounter_events.source_citation: it just sort of dematerialized, disappeared.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being disappears — beings that disappear and reappear. The deer-entity dematerializes before the witness.

encounter_events.source_citation: The deer was looking into my eyes and saying good-bye to me / the big eyes reminded me a little bit of the big eyes of . . . that the other people had
encounter_events.ai_justification: The deer-being stares directly into Virginia's eyes with large compelling eyes, and she connects these eyes to previous beings — suggesting a hypnotic or compelling quality.

encounter_events.source_citation: the big eyes reminded me a little bit of the big eyes of . . . that the other people had. And I had a sense of a personality about this deer / There was a person inside this deer.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia perceives a deer but recognizes it as a being in disguise — a perceptual distortion or screen memory where the true form of the entity is masked as an animal.

encounter_events.source_citation: It was as though I had a friend and I didn't want it to leave
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness describes a sense of friendship and emotional closeness with the being, consistent with E301 (friendly effect: witness senses kindness or feels as if among friends).

encounter_events.source_citation: it said it had to go. Good-bye. But it wasn't a final good-bye. It was like an 'I'll-see-you-again' good-bye.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being says farewell to the witness, matching M109 (farewell).

encounter_events.source_citation: just kind of an emotional one to me. It was as though I had a friend and I didn't want it to leave
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness expresses a sense of loss at the being's departure, consistent with E303 (sadness effect: sense of loss on departure).

encounter_events.source_citation: It was like an 'I'll-see-you-again' good-bye.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being implies it will return to the witness, matching M149 (beings promise to return to the witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: there are very bright lights in a spaceship. I remember them as being extremely bright.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness describes extremely bright interior lighting in the craft, matching U230 (bright and uniform, without specific source).

encounter_events.source_citation: they felt very sensitive, as though, you know, there are very bright lights in a spaceship / The light must not have been ideal for my eyes. / As though you want to shield your eyes from that bright light.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness reports eye sensitivity from the bright lights, with a physical reaction of covering her eyes during the session, matching A100 (eye troubles: sensitive to light).

encounter_events.source_citation: it seemed as though I had a memory that I finally did talk him into taking me for a ride, but he said he would just take me up and let me look at the Earth.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being agrees to the witness's request and accommodates her wish to see Earth, consistent with B901 (beings are helpful and considerate).

encounter_events.source_citation: I did look at the ground. I'm trying to remember what I looked at. I think I looked at where I lived. You know, North America from outer space / I was high enough that I could see the water at the edges, and the Great Lakes.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness sees Earth receding through a window or viewport as the craft ascends, matching W110 (otherworld seen approaching out a window, or earth departing).

encounter_events.source_citation: Smooth. Like a smooth elevator. Fast. Like as though it took only about as long as it takes you to get to the top of the Empire State Building. Not over a few minutes to get high enough to see.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness describes sensing smooth, rapid upward motion during the trip, matching W415 (witness senses motion or acceleration).

encounter_events.source_citation: Smooth. Like a smooth elevator.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The smooth, elevator-like motion implies an absence of noise or vibration inside the craft, consistent with U259 (silence).

encounter_events.source_citation: That pretty deer that I was so fond of. It was like my best, long-lost friend.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being appeared as a deer but was actually a person — this is a perceptual distortion or illusion, as the witness perceived a being in a form that was not its true nature.

encounter_events.source_citation: It was a person. It was a friend
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia identifies the deer as actually being a person — a humanoid entity disguised in another form.

encounter_events.source_citation: It was a friend, and I don't, ah, I'm describing it as though it was a mystical experience, but it didn't feel that way. It felt like it was a good, good friend
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being is described as a good, good friend — friendly and familiar in manner, matching B900 for beings that are friendly, polite, and familiar.

encounter_events.source_citation: It felt like it was a good, good friend
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness senses kindness and feels as if the being is a friend — the friendly effect on the witness's emotional state.

encounter_events.source_citation: He said he had to. I think he said he'd see me again. He had to leave.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being tells the witness it is time to go — he had to leave. This maps to beings saying the time has come to return/depart.

encounter_events.source_citation: I think he said he'd see me again.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being promises to return to the witness, matching M149 — beings promise to return to the witness.

encounter_events.source_citation: I didn't want him to go away.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness experiences a sense of loss at the being's departure, matching E303 — sadness effect, sense of loss on departure.

encounter_events.source_citation: I looked at where I lived . . . and it didn't look too much like a map
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia describes looking down at the Earth from the craft during a short flight, seeing where she lived from above. This matches W110 — otherworld seen approaching out a window, or earth departing.

encounter_events.source_citation: How I found him and how the communication happened I can't remember. There's a block-out.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness describes a memory block around the initial encounter, indicating a premonition-adjacent gap — more precisely a doorway amnesia or blocked memory around the start of the encounter.

encounter_events.source_citation: How I found him and how the communication happened I can't remember. There's a block-out.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness has no memory of the transition into the encounter — how she found the being or how communication began. This is a classic doorway amnesia at the entry point of the experience.

encounter_events.source_citation: I can think better when I cover my eyes because the light is . .. I can see it through my eyelids.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness experiences a perceptual distortion — seeing light through her eyelids during regression, suggesting a relived sensory anomaly from the encounter.

encounter_events.source_citation: I sure knew him and I sure communicated with him
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness describes communication with the being that is not verbal in the normal sense — she 'communicated' without remembering how, suggesting telepathic or non-verbal understanding.

encounter_events.source_citation: It was like such an excitement! It was as though you bump into a friend you haven't seen for a long time whom you really like, and you've lost their address, and you were so glad you found them.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness experiences an intense feeling of familiarity and friendliness toward the being, as if reuniting with a beloved friend. This maps to the friendly effect where the witness senses kindness and feels as if among friends.

encounter_events.source_citation: It was as though you bump into a friend you haven't seen for a long time whom you really like
encounter_events.ai_justification: The intense familiarity implies a prior relationship — the being is someone she has known before, suggesting the beings have watched or known the witness for a long time and have special interest in her.

encounter_events.source_citation: I didn't have a sense of lapsed time, but my parents said that I had been gone a while, but a while was probably no more than an hour.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness did not perceive the passage of time, but her parents noted she had been gone for approximately 30 minutes to an hour, indicating a classic time lapse.

encounter_events.source_citation: 'Your parents are calling you' / 'Well, you've got to go back and have your picnic'
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being tells the witness it is time to return to her parents, which maps to beings saying the time has come to return.

encounter_events.source_citation: I sure didn't want him to leave / I said, 'There's no rush!'
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness expresses a strong reluctance for the being to leave and resists the departure, indicating a sense of loss on departure.

encounter_events.source_citation: I don't think it was a deer. I mean, the mental image of a deer is there, the visual image, but the inner experience of it is not of a deer but of a person. Very definitely a human kind of a person.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness recognizes that the being she perceived as a deer was actually a human-type person. The screen memory of a deer conceals a human entity.

encounter_events.source_citation: I don't think it was a deer. I mean, the mental image of a deer is there, the visual image, but the inner experience of it is not of a deer but of a person.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The visual perception of a deer masking the actual presence of a person-like being is a perceptual distortion or illusion — a screen memory where the witness's perception was altered to see an animal instead of the true entity.

encounter_events.source_citation: And yet when I got back, I had this blood on my blouse. Just a little. Just where you would if you had a nosebleed.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness discovers blood on her blouse consistent with a nosebleed after the encounter, indicating unexplained physical marks or evidence of possible nasal probing.

encounter_events.source_citation: when I turned back, the deer was gone. / He just disappeared all of a sudden. It wasn't like he'd walked away.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being vanished instantaneously when the witness looked away momentarily — the being disappeared and did not walk away, mapping to beings who disappear and reappear.

encounter_events.source_citation: He just disappeared all of a sudden. It wasn't like he'd walked away.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The abrupt disappearance of the being also maps to the disappearance effect — the entity vanished without any normal physical departure.

encounter_events.source_citation: In that period of time, the deer was gone, and I didn't know whether it had run away into the woods, but it was just completely gone.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The deer vanishes instantaneously and inexplicably in the moment Virginia turns her head, consistent with a disappearance event.

encounter_events.source_citation: 'Well, Roger's been here. He was looking for you.' / 'Well, I went down there with him and I was with him the whole time.' / 'Well, he just came back. He couldn't find you.'
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia's brother was unable to find her despite her belief she was right there, and her family indicates she was missing for a period she cannot account for, indicating a time lapse.

encounter_events.source_citation: 'You have blood on your shirt.' And I looked and it was fresh. It was fresh, fresh blood. It was fresh as when you just cut yourself. It hadn't begun to dry at all, and so I looked on my hands, and no blood, and my neck, felt my face, no blood, and felt my nose, if I had a bloody nose. No bloody nose.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Fresh blood of unknown origin appears on the witness's blouse with no visible wound anywhere on her body, matching a wound of unknown origin that opens and bleeds.

encounter_events.source_citation: feeling very frustrated and disappointed and also as though I had lost something. Like if you're in a carnival with a friend and there are so many people and you turn to look at something and you let go of somebody's hand / It's a loss like being sort of yanked out of that transaction before it was over with.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia describes a profound sense of loss and being separated from the encounter prematurely, consistent with sadness effect upon departure.

encounter_events.source_citation: I have a big blank about what happened before that. Because the part I remember with that deer was the
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia retains fragmentary memories of the encounter — she remembers the final moments with the deer but has a large blank about what preceded it, indicating persistent but incomplete memory fragments.

encounter_events.source_citation: It's as though there's a big blank spot in the middle, and I don't know why that's blank.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia describes a period of missing time — a 'big blank spot' — in the middle of her experience, consistent with E200 (time lapse).

encounter_events.source_citation: I guess they had to give me, you know, a forget-it thing, because of my parents and family and stuff.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia attributes her amnesia to a deliberate act by the beings — a 'forget-it thing' — consistent with X311 (witness given something to cause forgetfulness/Lethe).

encounter_events.source_citation: I guess they had to give me, you know, a forget-it thing, because of my parents and family and stuff. / I think it was for our protection just in general.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia implies the beings told her to forget because the time was not right — she was a child and it was for her protection. This maps to M119 (beings tell subject to forget, because the time is not right).

encounter_events.source_citation: There's a very bright light. / There's so much light you can't really see clearly.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The light is so intense and pervasive that it obscures the craft's shape, suggesting light behaving in an unusual, overwhelming manner consistent with E125 (light behaves in odd way).

encounter_events.source_citation: There's a ship just like they have in the movies. It's round. It's top-shaped roughly, but I can't tell exactly.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia describes the craft as round and 'top-shaped,' which maps directly to U104 (bell, mushroom or top shape).

encounter_events.source_citation: It's interesting—here I go again with this feeling in my eyes.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia notes a recurring physical sensation in her eyes upon recalling the bright light, consistent with A100 (eye troubles — burn, vision impaired, sensitive). Although experienced during recall, the sensation is a recurring aftereffect triggered by the memory.

encounter_events.source_citation: A very bright light. Pretty. Bright light. . . . There was some pink in it. And blue. Bright light.
encounter_events.ai_justification: A bright, colorful beam of light immerses the witness, matching U120 (beam of light immerses the witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: And then I hear almost like a whisper, 'Virginia .. . Virginia,' and I think it was in my head that they were calling me, so they knew my name or they knew how to call me in my head
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness hears a voice in her head calling her name, which is telepathic communication matching C110 (subject hears voice in his head).

encounter_events.source_citation: so they knew my name or they knew how to call me in my head / I realized that ever since I was a little kid I had this memory of being . .. it must have happened the first time, too . . . of having my name called
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings know the witness's name and have been calling her since childhood, implying long-term special interest in the witness, matching M122.

encounter_events.source_citation: It was like there was a bright column of light.
encounter_events.ai_justification: A bright column of light behaving as a structural pathway is an odd behavior of light, matching E125 (light behaves in odd way, 'solid light').

encounter_events.source_citation: I went inside. / it was like a conveyor belt ramp. I stood on it and it lifted
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness enters the craft via a conveyor belt ramp, matching U133 (ramps, stairs).

encounter_events.source_citation: there was a celebration. They were visiting because they were celebrating something. / everybody on the ship was happy.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings are happy and celebrating an accomplishment, matching B914 (beings are happy in their work, or laugh).

encounter_events.source_citation: It was as though they had finished a research project and whatever the outcome was, whether to discover something, whether the research project or whatever—there was an accomplishment that they were very pleased about
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings have completed a research project, indicating they have come to learn or experiment, matching M125.

encounter_events.source_citation: It seems there were more this time than the three. And there was someone who became the deer later, was like a younger person, more like my age.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Dimorphism associated with rank or type: a younger being is distinguished from the original older beings, matching B805 (dimorphism associated with rank).

encounter_events.source_citation: it was a female feeling, like a friend / there was definitely sort of a female friend on the ship
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness perceives one of the beings as feminine, matching B211 (feminine).

encounter_events.source_citation: it was a female feeling, like a friend / it was a party. They were celebrating and they said they wanted to share it with me
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings are friendly and familiar in manner, inviting the witness to share in their celebration, matching B900.

encounter_events.source_citation: also at least two of the original people who had been on the first trip
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness recognizes beings from a previous encounter, implying this is a further abduction, matching A225.

encounter_events.source_citation: their research used their visit with me so they wanted to share it with me because my contributions had been really helpful for them.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings explain they have come to learn and experiment, and that the witness's prior contributions were helpful to their research.

encounter_events.source_citation: we were having a party and they were telling me about—they were having a hard time explaining to me why it was so exciting
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings are happy and excited about their work, described as having a party-like atmosphere.

encounter_events.source_citation: the older man who had done the research was really beside himself with excitement. As though he had accomplished something that he was really proud of.
encounter_events.ai_justification: One being acts as the leader/spokesman of the research effort, described as the older man who directed the research and is most emotionally invested.

encounter_events.source_citation: the older man who had done the research
encounter_events.ai_justification: One being is described as older, consistent with the elder motif.

encounter_events.source_citation: it had to do with research and it had to do with the study, but it seemed like its significance was greater / I guess they wanted a sample of me to see how I was different.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings are interested in the witness's internal makeup and chemical composition, wanting to understand how she has changed biologically since childhood.

encounter_events.source_citation: their research used their visit with me so they wanted to share it with me because my contributions had been really helpful for them.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings have watched the witness over time and have special interest in her, returning to her specifically because of prior visits.

encounter_events.source_citation: I said, 'I'm a mature'—you know, like I explained to them I've done all my growing now. 'When you saw me, I was a child, and I have done as much growing as I am going to do.' And I guess they wanted to know how I was different.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings show concern with age and growth, wanting to understand how the witness has changed from childhood to adulthood.

encounter_events.source_citation: I think they didn't want to leave a mark on me. So I think that's what happened.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings are helpful and considerate, deliberately choosing a method that would not leave a visible mark on the witness.

encounter_events.source_citation: I think they did take some blood from the inside of my nose.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings take a blood or body fluids sample from inside the witness's nose.

encounter_events.source_citation: it wasn't him and it wasn't the woman, who—the girl, who was sort of my age. It was—oh, I think it was his sidekick from the original trip.
encounter_events.ai_justification: An assistant (the leader's 'sidekick') performs the sample-taking procedure rather than the leader himself.

encounter_events.source_citation: They used the same instrument. It was like it had a handle that could just come out. It was like a touch on the inside. A sort of hum / A microphone. Not the kind that is like an ice cream cone, but just—this is one of the small ones, a little one. Little hand mike. Right. But it was all smooth.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings use a handheld instrument described as smooth, microphone-like, with a handle, to take the nasal sample.

encounter_events.source_citation: it had a little hum like you held it and it would go Hmmm and then that was all there was to it.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The instrument produces a humming or buzzing monotonous sound during operation.

encounter_events.source_citation: it wasn't the woman, who—the girl, who was sort of my age.
encounter_events.ai_justification: A feminine being is present among the group, described as a girl roughly the witness's age.

encounter_events.source_citation: find the blood on my blouse? The first time, I was glad to have a visible, physical evidence of it.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Blood found on the witness's clothing constitutes a physical mark or evidence of a wound, consistent with A105 (spots or reddish marks like puncture wounds, soreness).

encounter_events.source_citation: There were lights flickering on.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Lights flickering inside the craft describe interior illumination, consistent with U230 (bright and uniform lighting).

encounter_events.source_citation: it was just a party. There was a lot of talking and a good feeling and they were playing, um, playing light inside
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings are described as having a celebratory, party-like atmosphere with good feelings, consistent with B914 (beings are happy in their work, or laugh).

encounter_events.source_citation: I think they were playing music, too. And I think their music is more like what we think is like electronic, but not piercing and jarring. . . . It was patterned, highly sophisticated, stylized and patterned. . . . It was sounds that remind you of the sound of the wind going through the valley
encounter_events.ai_justification: Patterned, electronic-like, mellow sounds heard inside the craft are consistent with U530 (witness hears a buzzing, humming or other monotonous sound).

encounter_events.source_citation: they were talking to themselves and that had a sound—it was a little clicky, a little . . . it was like a voice was speaking, but a little bit more like smacking. You know, like some of that stuff in it, in the talking. And at a higher pitch than we talk.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings communicate among themselves using a clicky, smacking, high-pitched vocalization, consistent with C200 (beings communicate with each other using a mumbling or unusual sound).

encounter_events.source_citation: They were thinking at me, but they were talking to themselves
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings communicate with the witness telepathically ('thinking at me'), consistent with C110 (subject hears voice in head or understands meanings).

encounter_events.source_citation: And they were obviously excited.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings display obvious excitement, consistent with B911 (beings can be startled or excited).

encounter_events.source_citation: And they were trying to explain to me what they had accomplished, too.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings attempt to share knowledge of their accomplishments with the witness, consistent with M125 (they have come to learn, teach or experiment).

encounter_events.source_citation: I think they succeeded into talking somebody into considering us as an endangered species, or something equivalent to that. Not endangered. No, I guess it wouldn't be that. Umm . . . it was like a precious species, kind of a classification.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings' effort to classify humanity as a precious species reflects their interest in earthly conditions and problems, consistent with B740.

encounter_events.source_citation: it had to do with . . . I guess maybe establishing the principle of noninterference, something like that. . . . The kind of moral code they like to imagine intergalactic travelers have about not mucking up or interfering with indigenous cultures.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Establishing a principle of noninterference with indigenous cultures reflects a concern with peace and ethical conduct toward Earth, consistent with B720 (beings profess concern with peace).

encounter_events.source_citation: Well, she looked like them.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The female being is described as looking like the other beings, who are humanoid gray entities, consistent with B201 (humanoid).

encounter_events.source_citation: Can you focus on the woman now? What was she like? / Well, she looked like them.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being is identified as female, consistent with B211 (feminine).

encounter_events.source_citation: Except it seemed to me she was a lighter color. It's as though the older you got the darker gray you were.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings are described as gray in color with variation by age, consistent with B290 (skin white, gray, ashen or claylike).

encounter_events.source_citation: It's as though the older you got the darker gray you were. / the more senior you were, the darker it was.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Color variation correlated with seniority/age implies dimorphism associated with rank, consistent with B805.

encounter_events.source_citation: they were wearing these things—I think they were their protective costumes
encounter_events.ai_justification: Protective costumes worn by the beings are consistent with B302 (diving suit, astronaut or space suit).

encounter_events.source_citation: it seemed like hers was lighter, more creamy-colored. And it just felt like a younger person. Like a bouncier quality. It wasn't so delib-
encounter_events.ai_justification: The female being is described as feeling like a younger person with a bouncier quality, consistent with B760 (is too young).

encounter_events.source_citation: hers was more bubbly, more bouncy
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being Virginia interacts with is described with feminine characteristics and pronouns ('she'), indicating a feminine being.

encounter_events.source_citation: she wanted to hear about, you know, what the place (Earth—BH) was like. She hadn't been there and it was obviously a big treat for her to be there.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The young female being is friendly, excited, and familiar in manner toward the witness, treating the encounter as a treat.

encounter_events.source_citation: she was trying to tell me about the kinds of schools she went to / We were trying to discuss what young people do in their spare time.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being communicates verbally with Virginia in her language about schools, dating, and spare time activities, indicating verbal communication in the subject's language.

encounter_events.source_citation: she wanted to hear about, you know, what the place (Earth—BH) was like
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being expresses interest in earthly conditions, wanting to know what Earth is like.

encounter_events.source_citation: I don't think she was really my age, but I think that, whatever she was, it was analogous to being my age. Then she was trying to tell me about the kinds of schools she went to. She was still a schoolgirl or whatever
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being is described as young, analogous to Virginia's age, still a schoolgirl — indicating the being is too young, consistent with B760.

encounter_events.source_citation: I guess they have a mating process, too, because it was as though she was trying to explain about dating or whatever they do
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being describes a mating process analogous to human dating, indicating beings mate and have reproductive customs.

encounter_events.source_citation: she wanted to be a bioanthropologist like her father or grandfather, whoever he was
encounter_events.ai_justification: Reference to a father or grandfather figure who is a bioanthropologist implies a hierarchical or generational dimorphism associated with rank or expertise.

encounter_events.source_citation: I think that the blood sample was . . . she was going to have a chance to examine it, study it, too.
encounter_events.ai_justification: A blood sample was taken from Virginia, which the young being would get to study — confirming beings took a blood/body fluids sample.

encounter_events.source_citation: Maybe they took a tissue sample. I don't know.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia suspects a tissue sample was also taken, consistent with beings scraping or taking a sample of skin/tissue.

encounter_events.source_citation: It's sort of like my souvenir for her
encounter_events.ai_justification: The blood/tissue sample is described as a souvenir the beings take from the witness, fitting S105 — beings take objects from the witness.

encounter_events.source_citation: some of them were more junior to him, considerably, and they kept quiet. It was like they stood respectfully off a little bit
encounter_events.ai_justification: Junior beings stand respectfully and quietly, indicating a hierarchy where lower-ranking beings are subservient and do not participate actively.

encounter_events.source_citation: they were just standing there kind of being awed, you know, seeing a strange person and being at the party. The whole thing was really, um, a heavy trip for them.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The junior beings are described as awed and excited by the encounter, indicating beings can be startled or excited.

encounter_events.source_citation: The blood was the result of a probe of some kind inserted into her left nostril to take blood and tissue samples.
encounter_events.ai_justification: A probe was inserted into Virginia's left nostril to take samples, consistent with X245 — beings insert a long needle/probe into the head area (nostril).

encounter_events.source_citation: there is the detail of the blood on her blouse. Its presence is confirmed by her family, and it was even recorded on film.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Physical evidence of blood on her blouse after the encounter, confirmed by family and photographed, constitutes a physical aftereffect — marks or evidence of puncture/wound.

encounter_events.source_citation: He's taking an instrument and... He's putting that thing in my nose, and it's going up and it's breaking through something.
encounter_events.ai_justification: A handheld instrument is used on the witness during the examination, inserted into her nose.

encounter_events.source_citation: it's going up and it's breaking through something / He had that thing up in my head!
encounter_events.ai_justification: A long instrument is inserted into the head through the nose, consistent with X245 (beings insert a long needle into the head).

encounter_events.source_citation: I can't move.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness reports being unable to move during the procedure, indicating paralysis.

encounter_events.source_citation: Virginia made a drawing of the 'thin, hand microphone' type of object she recalled being placed in her nostril
encounter_events.ai_justification: The nasal probe that broke through tissue and was left 'up in my head' implies an implant procedure, consistent with X246 (beings implant a device in the head).

encounter_events.source_citation: She was asked about the lifespan of humans and various animals.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings questioned Virginia about lifespans, indicating concern with age (B707).

encounter_events.source_citation: She was asked about the lifespan of humans and various animals.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings interrogated the witness, asking her questions about human and animal lifespans.

encounter_events.source_citation: She was shown star maps which apparently were color-coded, and which were 'like slides . . . you know, like windows . . .'
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia was shown star maps, consistent with S101 (witness sees a star map depicting the beings' origin or route).

encounter_events.source_citation: She was shown star maps which apparently were color-coded, and which were 'like slides . . . you know, like windows . . .' This last detail, to me, is a six-year-old child's attempt to suggest the effect of a holograph
encounter_events.ai_justification: The star maps appeared three-dimensional like holograms viewed through windows, consistent with U351 (a cube or screen displaying clouds or three-dimensional imagery).

encounter_events.source_citation: And so he asked me, 'What are vegetables?' and I said that this is a broad term and could cover a great variety of certain kinds of foods we eat.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being questions the witness about human food and bodily functions (what humans eat), fitting B710 — beings question witness about body or bodily functions.

encounter_events.source_citation: he said, 'What is yellow?'
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being's ignorance of the concept of the color yellow demonstrates interest in and lack of understanding of basic earthly/cultural concepts, fitting B754 — interest in cultural artifacts.

encounter_events.source_citation: And so he asked me, 'What are vegetables?' / So he said, 'Tell me about squash.'
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being communicates verbally with the witness in her own language, fitting C101 — verbal communication in subject's language.

encounter_events.source_citation: She states as an accurate memory the fact that the inside of the UFO was very bright
encounter_events.ai_justification: The interior of the craft is described as very bright, fitting U230 — bright and uniform lighting without specific source.

encounter_events.source_citation: She recalls that her eyes were quite dry and irritated
encounter_events.ai_justification: Dry and irritated eyes during the encounter fit A100 — eye troubles (water, burn, vision impaired, sensitive). Though this occurs during the encounter, it is an effect on the witness's eyes consistent with A100.

encounter_events.source_citation: it was very dry
encounter_events.ai_justification: The atmosphere inside the craft is described as very dry, fitting U253 — air noxious, sickening, irritating, as the dry air caused physical irritation to the witness.

encounter_events.source_citation: The instrument inserted in her nostril 'had a little hum, like you held it and it would go hmmm and that was all there was to it.'
encounter_events.ai_justification: An instrument inserted into the witness's nostril fits X245 — beings insert a long needle into the head, usually through the nose. The humming instrument in the nostril is consistent with nasal probe procedures.

encounter_events.source_citation: Telepathically, she is called by name.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness hears a telepathic communication calling her by name, matching C110 (subject hears voice in head or understands meanings).

encounter_events.source_citation: an adolescent girl who had been abducted ten years earlier is somehow lured away from her family and into the woods.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia acts without knowing why, drawn away from her family toward the UFO, matching E218 (predestination: act without knowing why, or on an irresistible impulse).

encounter_events.source_citation: She goes towards the landed UFO
encounter_events.ai_justification: The UFO is described as landed, implying it had descended and was stationary on the ground.

encounter_events.source_citation: She goes towards the landed UFO and is taken inside.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The transition from outside to inside the craft is described without any memory of the doorway or entry process, implying doorway amnesia (E201).

encounter_events.source_citation: She is made to feel happy, part of a 'celebration in her honor,'
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness is made to feel happy and euphoric, matching E300 (pacification effect: witness calm, euphoric, relaxed).

encounter_events.source_citation: She is made to feel happy, part of a 'celebration in her honor,' but the main event is like the former—Virginia provides the gift.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings' friendliness and celebration are superficial, a cover for extracting samples from her, matching B907 (beings' friendliness really superficial, a cover).

encounter_events.source_citation: Blood and tissue samples are extracted from inside her nose.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Blood and tissue samples are taken from the witness, matching X235 (beings take a blood or body fluids sample).

encounter_events.source_citation: Blood and tissue samples are extracted from inside her nose.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The extraction from inside the nose indicates special interest in the head area, matching X240.

encounter_events.source_citation: She is then taken into the woods and given post-hypnotic suggestions that she will forget everything except the fact that she saw a beautiful deer.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings instruct the witness to forget the experience, matching M119 (beings tell subject to forget).

encounter_events.source_citation: given post-hypnotic suggestions that she will forget everything except the fact that she saw a beautiful deer.
encounter_events.ai_justification: A false screen memory of a deer is implanted, constituting a perceptual distortion/illusion (E106).

encounter_events.source_citation: She returns to her family only to discover that an odd time lapse has occurred
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness discovers missing time upon returning to her family, matching E200 (time lapse). This is a conscious realization after the event.

encounter_events.source_citation: there is fresh blood on her blouse.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Fresh blood on her blouse is physical evidence of the nasal extraction, matching A105 (spots or reddish marks like puncture wounds). This is a conscious observation after the encounter.

encounter_events.source_citation: The situation of abductees being made to feel special, loved, members of the 'select,' occasionally occurs in abduction cases.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia is made to feel she is specially selected, matching B765 (selectivity: only some witnesses meant to be taken).

encounter_events.source_citation: Since I remembered it happening the first time, I hardly even paid any attention to it.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia describes a nasal probe/sample being taken from inside her nostril, which constitutes probing the head area. The investigator contextualizes this as 'the apparent taking of blood and tissue from inside the nostril.'

encounter_events.source_citation: Since I remembered it happening the first time, I hardly even paid any attention to it.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The investigator explicitly describes this procedure as 'the apparent taking of blood and tissue from inside the nostril,' indicating a body fluid/tissue sample was taken.

encounter_events.source_citation: the older man, who had done the research, was really beside himself with excitement.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia describes an 'older man' among her captors who had done the research, indicating an elder being among the group.

encounter_events.source_citation: having a hard time explaining to me why it was so exciting, except that the older man, who had done the research, was really beside himself with excitement.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings are described as excited, with the older man 'beside himself with excitement,' indicating beings can be startled or excited.

encounter_events.source_citation: she heard her name being called 'in my head . . . so they knew my name. . . . They knew how to call me. . . .'
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia hears her name called telepathically ('in my head'), indicating telepathic communication from the beings to the witness.

encounter_events.source_citation: I don't know what they're doing, but they seem to be so happy about whatever they're doing.
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings appear happy during their work/tests on Virginia, matching B914 (beings are happy in their work).

encounter_events.source_citation: Virginia emerged from the Alsatian woods remembering only the excitement of her experience with the deer. / I remember thinking if they hadn't been hollering at me, I would still have been talking to the deer. . . . There was that sense of excitement and wonder.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia experiences a sense of excitement, wonder, and euphoria upon emerging from the encounter, consistent with rapture effect (E302).

encounter_events.source_citation: She was annoyed by her family's insistence that she had been missing
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia's family insists she was missing for a period she cannot account for, indicating a time lapse (E200).

encounter_events.source_citation: she still has not recalled the moment when, as a little girl, she first encountered the approaching gray-clad figures. Even her very earliest recollection—the sensation of being carried toward the UFO—is imperfectly remembered.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia has no memory of the transition from encountering the beings to being carried toward the craft, indicating doorway amnesia (E201).

encounter_events.source_citation: the sensation of being carried toward the UFO
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia recalls being carried toward the UFO, implying a levitation or drawing force transporting her to the craft.

encounter_events.source_citation: We know, of course, that Virginia Horton had a lengthy encounter at the age of six, and that during her second experience a probe of some sort was inserted in her nostril
encounter_events.ai_justification: The text references both a childhood encounter and a 'second experience,' establishing that Virginia underwent further abductions (A225).

encounter_events.source_citation: during her second experience a probe of some sort was inserted in her nostril and caused some bleeding when it was removed
encounter_events.ai_justification: A probe inserted into the nostril matches X245: beings insert a long needle/probe into the head, usually through the nose.

encounter_events.source_citation: The possibility remains that there was, in her case, too, something on the end of the nasal probe when it came out that was not there earlier
encounter_events.ai_justification: The investigator speculates that an implant placed during the childhood encounter may have been removed during the second experience via the nasal probe, matching X247: beings remove a device from the witness's body.

encounter_events.source_citation: We know, of course, that Virginia Horton had a lengthy encounter at the age of six
encounter_events.ai_justification: The investigator implies that an implant was placed during the childhood encounter at age six, drawing a parallel with Betty Andreasson's case where a 'tiny spherical object' was found on the nasal probe tip from an earlier childhood abduction. This implies X246: beings implant a device.

encounter_events.source_citation: She remembers "not paying much attention to it."
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia's lack of attention to a probe being inserted into her nostril and causing bleeding is an inappropriate or uncharacteristic response to an invasive procedure, matching E215.

encounter_events.source_citation: Like Virginia, a number of them recall seeing the same captors both times.
encounter_events.ai_justification: Virginia is described as having been abducted more than once, with the same captors appearing in both a childhood and later encounter, fitting the motif of further abductions.
